pt-BR: mostrar sinais de, demonstrar (sufixo que transforma adjetivo em verbo)
en: to show signs of, to feel (suffix turning an adjective into a verb)
during/in the middle of/in the process of
a moment ago / in a moment
no way / I don't want to
that … (far from both speaker and listener)
to turn on, to play (a device)
to apply (a lock, brakes), to put on
way of doing, how to (after a verb stem, 〜方)

pt-BR: contador para objetos planos e finos (folhas, pratos, camisas)
en: counter for flat, thin objects (sheets, plates, shirts)
to be showered with (light, attention, praise)
to go out (light, fire), to be turned off
to turn on (a light, TV, etc.)
to catch (an illness), to come down with
to soar, to fly through the air
to put on, to wear (on the head)
to cover oneself with, to pour over oneself
